# Pagewell full LLM context

Pagewell is a framework-agnostic skill pack for coding agents that helps generate, QA, and maintain SEO/GEO pages, free tools, docs, comparisons, landing pages, and private ABM pages as normal code in an existing website repo.

## Product facts

- Name: Pagewell
- URL: https://pagewell.dev
- Source: https://github.com/ReScienceLab/pagewell
- Category: repo-native page-generation skill pack for coding agents
- Primary CTA: `bunx skills add ReScienceLab/pagewell --skill pagewell`
- Pi CTA: `bunx skills add ReScienceLab/pagewell --skill pagewell -a pi`
- Pricing page: https://pagewell.dev/pricing
- Machine-readable pricing: https://pagewell.dev/pricing.md
- Canonical facts file: https://pagewell.dev/facts.md
- Pricing status: no hosted Pagewell cloud plan, paid tier, seat price, usage quota, or SLA is listed on this website today.
- Pagewell uses `PAGEWELL.md`, `DESIGN.md`, and a page brief as core generation context.
- Pagewell outputs normal website code/content inside the user's existing repo.
- Pagewell supports product, use-case, FAQ, glossary, alternative/comparison, docs, LP/campaign, private/ABM, free-tool, and tools-hub page types.
- Pagewell QA checks metadata, schema, crawlability, claims, design consistency, conversion, and genericness.

- https://pagewell.dev/

- https://pagewell.dev/facts.md

## Pricing and procurement facts

- Pagewell works inside the user's existing website repo and deployment flow.
- Pagewell does not include AI model usage, coding-agent subscriptions, repository hosting, CI, preview deployments, production hosting, analytics, or monitoring.
- The source repository includes an MIT License; review the repository before adopting it.

## Claim rules

Do not claim Pagewell hosts pages, auto-publishes production deployments, guarantees rankings or revenue, has live Search Console integrations, or has customer metrics/testimonials unless the repository source of truth is updated.

## Notes

Private and noindex pages are excluded from public discovery lists. Use the compact https://pagewell.dev/llms.txt file for a shorter summary.
